title: ConfigMaps, Secrets, Environment, Projection, Rotation, and Change Propagation
description: A payment-free intake service mixes public config with credentials, assumes environment values rotate, and releases without proving how changed data reaches running Pods. Learners cumulatively produce configuration and secret propagation contract through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Create and consume ConfigMaps through keys, files, env, envFrom, command arguments, immutable objects, and size or naming boundaries.
Distinguish base64 representation, API and etcd encryption, transport protection, RBAC, node exposure, application use, and external secret authority.
Compose Secret, ConfigMap, service account token, downward API, and cluster trust bundle projections with scoped paths, modes, audiences, and refresh behavior.
